name: Bob Lazar claims he worked at S4 on reverse-engineering an unconventional craft
summary: Bob Lazar has stated that he was assigned to an alleged facility called S4, where he worked on efforts to understand and reverse-engineer an unconventional craft.
status: Highly influential public allegation; not established as fact by GreyAlien.
evidenceNote: The profile separates Lazar's public interviews and cultural influence from disputes regarding his education, employment history, and supporting evidence.
